tags.name: commGatewayAuths
tags.description: CommGatewayAuth records stored in Unigate. List/create/update/delete is proxied through OMS UnigateServices.

tags.name: productStoreEmailSettings
tags.description: Per-product-store email notification configurations. Links emailType + productStore to a CommGatewayAuth.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page number to return, starting with zero

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 100)

parameters.name: orderByField
parameters.description: Field name to order by (or comma separated names)

parameters.name: pageNoLimit
parameters.description: If true don't limit page size (no pagination)

parameters.name: dependentLevels
parameters.description: Levels of dependent child records to include

parameters.name: payToPartyId
parameters.description: Note that this corresponds with the organizationPartyId that GL transactions will be posted to.

parameters.name: isImmediatelyFulfilled
parameters.description: If immediately fulfilled (for physical stores, etc): don't send email notices, don't reserve inventory, and IFF inventory info isn't found on the server then don't issue inventory right away

parameters.name: balanceResOnOrderCreation
parameters.description: If set to Y, when a new sales order is created with backordered items, then reservations on the facility/product are reassigned according to the priority given by the shipBeforeDate field.

parameters.name: storeCreditAccountEnumId
parameters.description:
Specify the type (Billing Account or Financial Account) of Store Credit Account used for refund return. Default to Financial Account. 
              This field is override by ReturnHeader.billingAccountId or ReturnHeader.finAccountId, whichever is specified but if only finAccountId is specified explicitly then system will first
              try to locate any billing account with -ve amount. If found, then amount is credit to this billing account else the amount will be credit to the financial account of the user.

parameters.name: autoInvoiceDigitalItems
parameters.description: Default Y. Invoice digital items when order is placed rather than waiting for completing order items (though shipment/fulfillment).

parameters.name: reqShipAddrForDigItems
parameters.description: Default Y. Require Shipping Address for Digital Items? Note this only has an effect if there are ONLY digital goods in the cart.

parameters.name: showTaxIsExempt
parameters.description: default Y; if set to N do not show isExempt checkbox for PartyTaxAuthInfo, always force to N

parameters.name: enableAutoSuggestionList
parameters.description: The auto-suggestion list is a special ShoppingList that the addSuggestionsToShoppingList service will maintain for cross-sells of ordered items.

parameters.name: prodSearchExcludeVariants
parameters.description: default Y; if set to Y an additional constraint will of isVariant!=Y will be added to all product searches for the store

parameters.name: autoOrderCcTryExp
parameters.description: For auto-orders try other Credit Card expiration dates (if date is wrong or general failure where type not known)?

parameters.name: autoOrderCcTryOtherCards
parameters.description: For auto-orders try other Credit Cards for the customer?

parameters.name: autoOrderCcTryLaterNsf
parameters.description: For auto-orders if Credit Cards fails for NSF (Not Sufficient Funds) try again later?

parameters.name: autoOrderCcTryLaterMax
parameters.description: For auto-orders if Credit Cards fails for NSF try again how many times?

parameters.name: storeCreditValidDays
parameters.description: How many days that store credit is valid for. Null value implies no expiration.

parameters.name: autoApproveInvoice
parameters.description: If Y or empty, sales invoices created from orders will be marked ready.

parameters.name: autoApproveOrder
parameters.description: If N, orders will not be automatically approved when payment is authorized.

parameters.name: shipIfCaptureFails
parameters.description: If N, the captureOrderPayments will cause a service error if credit card capture fails.

parameters.name: setOwnerUponIssuance
parameters.description: If Y or empty, set the inventory item owner upon issuance.

parameters.name: reqReturnInventoryReceive
parameters.description: Default N. This is the default value for the ReturnHeader.needsInventoryReceive field. If set to Y return will automatically go to the Received status when Accepted instead of waiting for actual receipt of the return.

parameters.name: addToCartRemoveIncompat
parameters.description: Default N. If Y then on add to cart remove all products in cart with a ProductAssoc record related to or from the product and with the PRODUCT_INCOMPATABLE type.

parameters.name: addToCartReplaceUpsell
parameters.description: Default N. If Y then on add to cart remove all products in cart with a ProductAssoc record related from the product and with the PRODUCT_UPGRADE type.

parameters.name: splitPayPrefPerShpGrp
parameters.description: Default N. If Y then before the order is stored the OrderPaymentPreference record will be split, one for each OrderItemShipGroup.

parameters.name: managedByLot
parameters.description: If Y, the preparator can choose the InventoryItem by this lotId when he makes the picklist.

parameters.name: showOutOfStockProducts
parameters.description: Default Y. If N then out of stock products will not be displayed on site

parameters.name: orderDecimalQuantity
parameters.description: use to indicate if decimal quantity can be ordered for this producStore. Default value is Y

parameters.name: allowComment
parameters.description: Allow comments for order line items per store

parameters.name: catalogUrlMountPoint
parameters.description: Catalog Url mount point to be used

parameters.name: restockingFeePercentage
parameters.description: Restocking fee percentage

parameters.name: capturePmntsOnOrdApproval
parameters.description: Flag to identify if order payments have to be captured when order is added to CSV with value Y or N

parameters.name: termTypeId
parameters.description: Order for products of store will be placed with defined term type.

parameters.name: autoSetFacility
parameters.description: Mainly used to control nearest facility work flow

parameters.name: enableExternalPromotion
parameters.description: Flag to identify if the external promotions are enabled for the store.

parameters.name: daysToReturn
parameters.description: Indicates number of days till order can be returned

parameters.name: restockingFeeFixed
parameters.description: Indicates Fee charged for Restocking.

parameters.name: autoAcceptReturn
parameters.description: Flag to identify if the return will be accepted automatically.

parameters.name: productIdentifierEnumId
parameters.description: Product identifier to identify unique product

parameters.name: enablePreOrderAutoReleasing
parameters.description: Flag to enable/disable auto preorder releasing on particular store/brand.

parameters.name: enableBrokering
parameters.description: Flag to enable/disable brokering on particular store/brand.

parameters.name: storeLogoImageUrl
parameters.description: Image path for display brand specific logo

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page number to return, starting with zero

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 100)

parameters.name: orderByField
parameters.description: Field name to order by (or comma separated names)

parameters.name: pageNoLimit
parameters.description: If true don't limit page size (no pagination)

parameters.name: dependentLevels
parameters.description: Levels of dependent child records to include
